name: Andrew Chen
title: Developer
description: Andrew is a sophomore at Interlake High School and manages software-related work for WAMO. In his free time, he enjoys reading, practicing competitive programming, and participating in robotics.

name: Hanbin Wang
title: Problem Writer
description: Hanbin is a freshman at Interlake High School. Besides competing in and writing problems for math competitions, Hanbin likes running, swimming, and playing video games. His favorite math subject is algebra.
